creator: dohzono@axion-software.com
text:
Additional information:

I've upgraded the base system to 8.0, and
xf86-video-intel-2.7.1 works well like 2.5.1 does
(Switching to/from console several times still
have problems, though).

Suggesting the developer to try on 7.2R may be a
help, because some problems seems to depend on
timing issues, to make the intel-driver being
robust.
